name: Generate Tailwind + jQuery - Modal System
description: Test code generation: reusable modal system with animations and stacking
prompt:
Tulis kode HTML + jQuery + Tailwind untuk modal system yang reusable:
- Fungsi openModal(id) dan closeModal(id) untuk buka/tutup modal by ID
- Backdrop: fixed, inset-0, bg-black/50, z-40, transition-opacity
- Modal container: fixed, inset-0, z-50, flex, items-center, justify-center
- Modal content: bg-white, rounded-2xl, shadow-2xl, max-w-lg, w-full, mx-4, transform, transition-all
- Animasi open: scale-95 → scale-100, opacity-0 → opacity-100
- Animasi close: scale-100 → scale-95, opacity-100 → opacity-0
- Close saat klik backdrop atau tombol X
- Support stacking: modal di atas modal, z-index increment per level

Jika 3 modal dibuka berturut-turut (modal-1, modal-2, modal-3), dan z-index base adalah 50 dengan increment 10 per modal, berapa z-index modal teratas?
